lines: Tomas watches the road through a broken shutter.
"No boot marks since before the knives. Not Remnant boots, not wall boots. Something swallowed the road before the cult found us."
Tomas has the look of a man who counted exits until the numbers stopped helping.
"I ran messages to the Hallowfen outposts. Same route every week. Then the bells quit answering. Selka told me not to go looking alone."
